summary: Iteration 21 - Group Lessons Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). All group lesson endpoints fully functional: create lesson (teacher), list upcoming/live lessons, get single lesson, book lesson (student), cancel booking, get teacher's lessons, start lesson (creates Daily.co room), join live lesson (booked student), end lesson (teacher). Security verified: password_hash NOT exposed in any response. Daily.co room creation is REAL (not mocked).

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only testing for React Native/Expo app)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/group-lessons - VERIFIED: Teacher creates lesson with proper structure (id, title, description, dance_category, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, max_participants, price, status=upcoming, booked_count=0)
GET /api/group-lessons - VERIFIED: Returns only 'upcoming' and 'live' status lessons with teacher info
GET /api/group-lessons/{id} - VERIFIED: Returns single lesson with teacher info, 404 for non-existent
POST /api/group-lessons/{id}/book - VERIFIED: Student books lesson, rejects double booking, rejects if lesson full
DELETE /api/group-lessons/{id}/book - VERIFIED: Student cancels booking, rejects if not booked
GET /api/my-group-lessons - VERIFIED: Returns only teacher's own lessons
POST /api/group-lessons/{id}/start - VERIFIED: Teacher starts lesson (creates Daily.co room), 403 if not teacher, returns existing room_url if already started (idempotent)
POST /api/group-lessons/{id}/join - VERIFIED: Booked student joins live lesson, 403 if not booked, 400 if not started
POST /api/group-lessons/{id}/end - VERIFIED: Teacher ends lesson (status=completed), deletes Daily.co room, 403 if not teacher
SECURITY - VERIFIED: password_hash NOT present in any API response (create, list, get, my-lessons)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per testing request - React Native/Expo app, backend only)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests create TEST_ prefixed group lessons for each test case.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Lessons feature fully tested and working. All 9 endpoints verified: POST /api/group-lessons (create), GET /api/group-lessons (list), GET /api/group-lessons/{id} (single), POST .../book (student books), DELETE .../book (cancel), GET /api/my-group-lessons (teacher's), POST .../start (creates Daily.co room), POST .../join (student joins), POST .../end (teacher ends). Daily.co integration is REAL - room URLs are valid https://xxx.daily.co/xxx format. Security verified - no password_hash leaks.
mocked_api_note: Daily.co integration is REAL (not mocked). Room URLs are created/deleted via Daily.co API. DAILY_API_KEY is configured in backend/.env.
